violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. FMC has expired and must re-instate. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC drained sink and refilled to proper concentration (50 ppm). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine and can opener taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
Knife and spatula observed between prep unit and table. PIC moved utensils during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chloring sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Inspector provided some during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit gaskets and can opener base have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
A leak was observed at 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

The condensates from the walk-in and prep unit refrigeration are draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

The floors in the walk-in have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
